name: showrunner
description: A four-policy workflow for product direction, implementation, security, and architecture synthesis.

interface.shortDescription: Forge the direction, Arc the build, Sentry the risk, Bible the system.
interface.longDescription: ShowRunner is a project-neutral workflow skill for moving software work from idea to verified implementation with explicit decision gates, security review, browser evidence, penetration-test governance, and architecture synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Run a Sentry sweep for this project.
